claim_boundary: The neutral boundary kernel is not a physical neutrino mass matrix without basis, scale, and Dirac/Majorana theorem support.
display_name: Neutrino physical basis, scale, and Dirac/Majorana theorem

assumptions: PMNS target labels do not determine a mass basis
formal_statement.statement: The neutral boundary kernel defines a physical neutrino mass or effective-mass operator only after a physical state-basis map, dimensional scale, ordering policy, and Dirac/Majorana convention are derived.
